location.name: Art appraisers in Chicago, Illinois
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Chicago, Illinois.

listedAppraisers.name: Chicago Art Source
listedAppraisers.description: Chicago Art Source provides both corporate and residential art services to its customers and has a 40,000-square-foot production facility in Chicago.

listedAppraisers.name: DeGroot Fine Art
listedAppraisers.description: Art consultants specializing in contemporary and customized services for corporate and private clientele nationwide. Offering certified appraisals and expert consulting.

listedAppraisers.name: GB Fine Art
listedAppraisers.description: GB Fine Art is an independent, full-service fine art appraisal firm based in Chicago serving the greater Midwest. Founded in 2012 by principal appraiser Gretchen Burch, the firm provides objective, USPAP-compliant appraisals and collection management guidance to help clients make informed decisions regarding insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and equitable distribution.

listedAppraisers.name: Jean Albano Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Jean Albano Gallery has been a fixture in Chicago's River North gallery district for over 40 years, specializing in contemporary art and works on paper.

listedAppraisers.name: Leslie Hindman Auctioneers
listedAppraisers.description: Leslie Hindman Auctioneers is one of the premier auction houses in Chicago, offering fine art appraisals and auction services for fine art, decorative arts, jewelry, and collectibles since 1982.

listedAppraisers.name: Lindsey M Owen
listedAppraisers.description: Lindsey M Owen offers art appraisal services serving Chicago, IL. FAIR directory data indicates specialties in Art, Drawings, Paintings, Prints, Sculpture, ISA CAPP, with direct website contact available for project-specific valuation requests.

listedAppraisers.name: Lindsey Owen Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Lindsey Owen Appraisals provides service to Chicago, IL, offering USPAP-compliant appraisals of fine art and antiques with an art advisory team to assist collectors and institutions.

listedAppraisers.name: Maxwell Colette Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Maxwell Colette Gallery specializes in post street contemporary art from emerging and established artists. Founded in 2010 with a mission to blur the boundaries between street art and fine art.

listedAppraisers.name: Metropolitan Art Appraisers
listedAppraisers.description: With over 25 years of experience in the Chicago art scene, Metropolitan Art Appraisers provides expert valuation services for collectors, institutions, and insurance purposes.

listedAppraisers.name: Midwestern Arts & Antiques
listedAppraisers.description: Midwestern Arts & Antiques has been serving Chicago for over 40 years, offering art and antique appraisal services alongside their gallery and shop in the Lincoln Square neighborhood.

listedAppraisers.name: MIR Appraisal Services Inc
listedAppraisers.description: MIR Appraisal Services, Inc. is a Chicago-based, research-driven advisory firm specializing in fine art and personal property. Since 1994, they have provided customized, research-backed valuation services to private and corporate collectors, insurance and financial professionals, law firms, government agencies, and nonprofit institutions across the U.S. and internationally.

listedAppraisers.name: Rago Arts Services
listedAppraisers.description: Rago Arts Services provides expert appraisal and auction consultation for 20th century design, contemporary art, and fine decorative arts in the Chicago area.

listedAppraisers.name: Richardson Antiques & Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Richardson Antiques & Fine Art Appraisals has been serving the Chicago area for over 25 years, providing expert appraisals for antiques, fine art, furniture, and decorative arts.

listedAppraisers.name: Rosenthal Fine Art Inc
listedAppraisers.description: Rosenthal Fine Art is located in the heart of the historic Gold Coast neighborhood. The gallery occupies the second floor of a charming newly renovated space specializing in fine art.

listedAppraisers.name: Russell Bowman Art Advisory
listedAppraisers.description: Russell Bowman Art Advisory operates as a provider of collection development and management services. Based in Chicago, it renders numerous services including art appraisal and consulting.
